description_long: This is a cylindrical, red fire extinguisher with a weathered and rusted surface, indicating prolonged exposure to the elements or heavy use. The body features a faded, partially illegible label on the front, surrounded by patches of chipped paint and corrosion. A black hose is attached to the side, curving upward and secured near the top, with a metallic nozzle at the end. The top of the extinguisher is fitted with a black metal handle and lever mechanism, which appears robust and functional. The overall form is classic for portable fire extinguishers, with a rounded top and flat base for stable placement. The object exudes a utilitarian, industrial feel, suitable for garages, workshops, or public urban spaces.
description: A weathered red fire extinguisher with a faded label, black hose, and metal handle, showing signs of rust and heavy use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the faded label, rusted red body, and attached black hose curving upward.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the cylindrical body, with the handle and hose attachment visible from behind.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the full length of the black hose and the lever mechanism on top.
description_view_3: Opposite rear view focusing on the back of the extinguisher and the hose running vertically along the body.
attribute_label_or_signage: A faded, rectangular label is present on the front of the cylinder, mostly white with some red text and symbols, partially illegible due to wear.
attribute_hose_or_nozzle: A black hose is attached to the side, approximately the length of the cylinder, ending in a metallic nozzle and secured near the top.
